mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_balances (account_code, balance, last_applied_entry_id, last_snapshot_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{accountCode}, #{balance}, #{lastAppliedEntryId}, #{lastSnapshotAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT (account_code) DO UPDATE SET balance = EXCLUDED.balance, last_applied_entry_id = EXCLUDED.last_applied_entry_id, last_snapshot_at = EXCLUDED.last_snapshot_at, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at WHERE account_balances.last_applied_entry_id < EXCLUDED.last_applied_entry_id
